acme.text: Open action item: Security audit dossier must be delivered to Sarah Chen before final sign-off.
Uploaded contract specifies Net-30 payment terms and Clause 4.2 auto-renewal (requires 30-day notice).
Mark Liu (Account Director) is the primary decision maker; Sarah Chen is no longer involved.
Timeline pushed to Q3. Budget cut to $144K ARR.

techcorp.text: James Wright (VP Sales) is coordinating procurement and internal sign-offs.
Proposal sent for $250K ARR, targeting a mid-Q3 start.

novapay.text: Elena Rostova (Product Lead) is the main champion; exploring initial integration scope.
